# KACISTUDIO

> A Singapore-based Gen Z social media agency that helps brands tell their story with intention.

KACISTUDIO is a story-first social media agency founded in 2025 by Angeline Khor and Jovinna Chow. We work with a small roster of lifestyle, beauty, and wellness brands — two new brands per quarter, max — so the attention never gets diluted. Founder-led by Gen Z creatives who live on TikTok and Instagram, we handle strategy, production, community, and events as one continuous rhythm. Singapore-based, working with global clients.

## Services

- [Monthly Retainer Social Media Management](https://kacistudio.co/services#monthly-retainer): End-to-end social media management across Instagram, TikTok, and more — strategy, production, posting, and community as one continuous rhythm. 8 TikToks, 4 IG Reels, 4 statics, 8 Stories per month.
- [Content Strategy and Planning](https://kacistudio.co/services#content-strategy): A monthly content calendar built around your brand's story. Every post has a reason, a tone, and a place in the bigger picture.
- [Photography and Video Production](https://kacistudio.co/services#photography-video-production): Planned and produced shoot days, shot on professional gear (Sony FX3) and edited in-house. Reels, statics, behind-the-scenes, and product content — all on-brand.
- [Community Management](https://kacistudio.co/services#community-management): DMs, comments, and replies handled with the same voice as your content. The team that made it is the team that replies.
- [Event Branding and Marketing](https://kacistudio.co/services#event-branding): On-ground coverage, event content strategy, and real-time social for launches, pop-ups, and campaigns.

## Selected Work

- [Resurrack × LittleMissMarket](https://kacistudio.co/work#case-resurrack): Lifestyle co-brand collab across TikTok and Instagram. Narrative built around a "weekend ritual" rather than a product push. Results updating. (2025)
- [Flyco](https://kacistudio.co/work#case-flyco): Customisable luggage brand. Blackpink concert campaign using BLINK fan culture language. Result: 23K+ campaign video views. (2025)
- [Brixx Derma](https://kacistudio.co/work#case-brixx): Derm-led skincare brand. Rebuilt social around nightly-routine TikToks and ingredient storytelling. Result: 30K+ Instagram views (73% new audiences), +500% TikTok view growth, +1,700% TikTok likes growth. (2026)
- [Melissa Shoes](https://kacistudio.co/work#case-melissa): Fashion brand. Motion-first campaign connecting Gen Z and millennials. Result: 10K+ views across campaigns, 900%+ audience interaction uplift. (2025)
- [Coffeeman@NYP](https://kacistudio.co/work#case-coffeeman): F&B new menu launch. Intimate, warm content that let the food speak. Result: 1K+ views per video, 92% new audiences reached. (2025)
- [Happy Rei](https://kacistudio.co/work#case-happyrei): Kids' lifestyle brand. Reel built around children choosing and rating their own favourites — proof through everyday affection rather than a catalogue pitch. Results updating.
- [Luminance Learning](https://kacistudio.co/work#case-luminance): Math tuition brand. 60-second Q&A shaped around the confidence and reassurance questions families quietly carry. Results updating.
- [Fine Today Singapore (FINO)](https://kacistudio.co/work#case-fino): Japanese haircare brand. UGC-led content introducing FINO in a relatable, Gen Z-friendly, lifestyle-driven way across the SEA market. Results updating.

## Key Facts

- Based in Singapore
- Founded 2025
- Founders: Angeline Khor (content ideation, aesthetic curation), Jovinna Chow (shoot production, campaign execution)
- Hours: Mon–Fri 10:00–19:00 SGT
- Response time: within 2 business days
- Commitment: month-to-month, no lock-in contracts
- Capacity: two new brands per quarter, max
- Agency stats: 8 client case studies, 500%+ TikTok growth on flagship campaigns
- Platforms managed: Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Lemon8, Xiaohongshu, Telegram

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Can I pick and choose deliverables?** We offer custom packages based on your brand's needs. Whether you need full-scope management or support in specific areas, we'll shape the scope around what feels most aligned for this season.

**Do you work with brands outside Singapore?** Yes — Singapore-based, but clients are global. Shoot days happen in SG; strategy, editing, management, and community work asynchronously across time zones.

**How long is the commitment?** Month-to-month. Every cycle ends with a review — you decide if it feels right to continue.

**Who owns the content?** You do. All raw footage, edits, photography, and brand assets are yours to keep, use, and repurpose — forever.
